summary: Completed frontend testing of YAML and CSV export functionality for customer discovery data. All export features working correctly.
passed_tests: Export dropdown button appears in customer detail header
Export as YAML option downloads .yaml file with correct extension
Export as CSV option downloads .csv file with correct extension
Export dropdown contains both YAML and CSV options
File downloads initiated successfully for both formats
Export button properly positioned in customer detail header
Navigation to customer detail page works correctly
Customer detail page loads with proper data structure
